note: Push notifications! Daily morning ping when invoices, recurring items, or jobs are due in the next 2 days. Setup: generate a VAPID keypair (worker/vapid-keygen.html), paste the public key into index.html, deploy worker/push-cron.js to Cloudflare Workers with the cron trigger, run the alter-table for push_subscription. Full steps in worker/README.md. iPhone needs iOS 16.4+ and the app installed to Home Screen.
